headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Norfolk Southern (NSC) After A 44% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Norfolk Southern at around US$315.90 offers good value today, it helps to separate the share price story from what the underlying business might be worth. The stock has seen a 9.7% return over the last 30 days, 9.8% year to date and 44.1% over the past year, while the 7 day return of a 0.9% decline shows that shorter term sentiment can still shift quickly. Recent news around Norfolk Southern has focused heavily on operational reliability, service quality and...
